Params: {1: '1', 3: 'You slowly wake up. When you open your eyes, you\'re met with Alpha\'s face just inches away.'}
{3: 'A few strands of white hair fall from behind her ear and partly cover her eyes. The hair brushes your cheek, causing a slight tickle.'}
{3: 'She seems distracted and doesn\'t notice right away that you\'re awake.'}
{3: 'Alpha stands up, turns her face away, and starts to leave.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Nothing. I just wanted to make sure you were okay.', 4: '1', 18: '100017245'}
{3: 'You push yourself up and realize you\'re lying on the sofa with a blanket over you.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Not long. Three hours. It\'s the middle of the night outside.', 4: '1', 18: '100017247'}
{3: 'She steps out and closes the door, giving you a moment alone.'}
{3: 'You straighten your clothes and open the door.'}

{3: 'Alpha is in the corner, back against the wall. Roland sits on the sofa, arranging food on the table. Lamia crouches nearby, looking gloomy, and sneaks a forkful of beef into her mouth when Roland isn\'t watching.'}
{3: 'Steak, mashed potatoes, foie gras, popcorn, noodles, nuts... An eclectic feast of mismatched dishes. Judging by Roland\'s face, gathering it took some effort.'}
{3: 'Looks like her hidden snack stash got commandeered too.'}
{3: 'You sit down, eat a bite of sliced beef, and bring the conversation back to the deal you made.'}
{3: 'Alpha comes over and sits beside you.'}
{2: 'Roland, you said you want to end their rule.', 3: '59'}
{2: 'So we still have to wipe out the remaining mechanoids?', 3: '60'}
{2: 'Roland', 3: 'There\'s a weapons factory in the west. Xun turned it into a nonstop production line for mechanoids.', 4: '1', 18: '100017251'}
{3: 'Roland taps his terminal and projects a city map above the table.'}
{3: 'Roland does. Two areas light up, one outside the city and one in the west.'}
{3: 'You eat a spoonful of mashed potatoes while studying the map.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: 'With what we\'ve got, why not just push through head-on?', 4: '18', 18: '100017252'}
{2: 'We could, but it would take too long. Not the best play.', 3: '84'}
{2: 'We choose where the final fight happens.', 3: '85'}
{3: 'You point to an abandoned square on the east edge. The map zooms in. The name appears—Curo Square.'}
{2: 'Step one. We lure Xun and his mechanoids here.', 3: '90'}
{2: 'We hit them in front, act like we\'re losing, then retreat and pull them into pursuit.', 3: '91'}
{2: 'Roland gets EMPs strong enough and plants them ahead of time.', 3: '92'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Roland', 3: 'Oh? Creative. Once we pack this place with enough mechanoids... boom.', 4: '1', 18: '100017253'}
{2: 'Roland', 3: 'Xun and his whole mechanoid army go down together.', 4: '1', 18: '100017254'}
{2: 'Lamia sneaks into the factory and plants explosives.', 3: '106'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Roland', 3: 'Sounds good. I\'ll need time to get the EMPs and the explosives.', 4: '1', 18: '100017257'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: 'I\'m finishing Xun myself. Roland, I\'ll borrow your weapon when it\'s time.', 4: '1', 18: '100017258'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Roland nods and throws up an OK sign.'}
{3: 'Roland smiles like he\'s been waiting for that line.'}
{3: 'He rises from the sofa and strides to the wall, one hand behind his back and the other raised high, his gestures as exaggerated as his tone.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Roland', 3: 'Roland\'s limited-time armory is now open. May our customers leave fully stocked!', 5: '1', 18: '100017259'}
{3: 'A seam opens in the wall. Gears click. The wall splits, revealing a hidden room behind it.'}

{3: 'A dim blue light pours down from ceiling panels, washing the whole room in a cold tone. Metal weapon racks stand in neat rows. The clean, hard look of it feels like the complete opposite of the run-down office outside.'}
{3: 'Long blades, short swords, daggers, pistols, rifles... Everything is sorted by type and mounted on the racks.'}
{3: 'In the center of the room, a set of power armor hangs carefully on a stand. It\'s been maintained with care. The Gray Raven emblem on it doesn\'t have a single scratch.'}
{3: 'Seeing it, you can\'t help letting out a gasp.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Roland', 3: 'A fine purchase from the black market, lovingly maintained by myself.', 4: '1', 18: '100017260'}
{2: 'You\'re saying you found this on the black market?', 3: '142'}
{2: 'Roland', 3: 'Don\'t get stuck on the details. What matters is it\'s exactly what you need right now.', 4: '1', 18: '100017261'}
{3: 'Alpha\'s attention is caught by something covered with a tarp. She walks over and pulls it off.'}
{3: 'A heavy motorcycle comes into view, half disassembled. She steps closer and checks the frame, the engine, and the tires.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Roland', 3: 'Tools and spare parts are all here. Use whatever you need, Alpha.', 4: '1', 18: '100017263'}
{2: 'Roland', 3: 'Alright. Everyone, get ready on your end. I\'ll go grab the explosives and EMPs.', 4: '1', 18: '100017264'}
{3: 'Roland turns and leaves the room, but not before switching on the radio to play some music.'}
{3: 'Alpha walks straight to the motorcycle, digs through the pile of tools, finds the right ones, and gets to work.'}
{3: 'You set a can of soda on the workbench, grab another for yourself, and pop the tab. The crisp click echoes in the empty room.'}
{2: 'I\'ve been wanting to ask you something for a while.', 3: '170'}
{2: 'Where did you learn to do all this?', 3: '171'}
{3: 'Alpha doesn\'t pause. She tightens a bolt with a wrench.'}
{3: 'She naturally understands the meaning behind your words. At the very least, in that memory from F.O.S. College, she was indeed not particularly skilled at repairing motorcycles.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Taught myself. Take enough things apart, and you figure it out.', 4: '1', 18: '100017265'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'There\'s a lot of useful stuff buried out there. If you\'re willing to put in the time, you can learn almost anything.', 4: '1', 18: '100017266'}
{3: 'Alpha glances at the drink in your hand.'}
{3: 'You open the can on the workbench and hand it to her.'}
{3: 'The radio starts playing a gloomy post-punk track.'}
{3: '"I believe I will... it\'s not all for nothing..."'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha leans against the workbench, wipes her hands, and takes a sip of soda.'}
{3: 'A brief look of remembrance passes through her eyes, then it\'s gone.'}
{3: 'There are things neither of you can say out loud. Right now, it feels like silence is enough.'}
{3: 'Prep time passes quickly. You check your gear over and over, making sure the weapons won\'t fail and your body is ready.'}
{3: 'Alpha wipes the oil off the bike with a rag, steps back, and looks it over. The motorcycle looks completely different now.'}
{3: 'She gives a smile, tosses the rag into a nearby tool bucket, and looks over to Roland sitting on the sofa next door.'}
{3: 'The rebuilt heavy motorcycle tears across the wasteland, kicking up a long trail of dust as it races east.'}
{3: 'Alpha leans forward as she rides. You sit behind her in the power armor.'}
{3: 'In the distance, countless black dots move in a slow mass. It\'s Xun\'s mechanoid army, building a crude but massive defensive line around the rift.'}
{3: 'The motorcycle accelerates again. The tachometer needle climbs close to the red line.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'It doesn\'t take long before the patrol mechanoids spot you.'}
{2: 'Armed Drone', 3: 'High-threat targets detected! Matching database... match confirmed! Wanted level: maximum!', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3', 18: '100017272'}
{2: 'Armed Drone', 3: 'High-threat targets detected! Cease all movement immediately and await judgment!', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3', 18: '100017273'}
{3: 'A beam blasts from your weapon and punches straight through the mechanoid ahead.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Too many of them. Give me heavier firepower.', 4: '18', 18: '100017275'}
{3: 'The grenades fly in a low arc and drop into the center of the mechanoid mass.'}
{3: 'Shockwaves spread out from the blast. More than a dozen mechanoids are thrown into the air, tumbling, breaking apart, and exploding mid-flight.'}
{3: 'Burning wreckage crashes down, knocking nearby mechanoids off balance.'}
{3: 'Alpha slams the brakes, leaving a long skid mark as the motorcycle spins 180 degrees and stops.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'She jumps off and draws her long blade. The edge shines with a hungry crimson glow.'}
{3: 'At the same time, the first wave reaches you. Over a dozen mechanoids rush in together, moving in perfect unison.'}
{3: 'Alpha charges forward and sweeps her blade.'}
{3: 'Her blade hits the lead mechanoid head-on. Sparks burst. Metal screams.'}
{3: 'The mechanoid is split in two instantly.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha flicks her blade and looks toward the rift.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Like he\'s answering her, a nasty, many-legged mechanical shape starts hopping forward through the mechanoid crowd.'}
{3: 'He leaps high. His limbs spread out midair like a metal flower, then he slams down toward you and Alpha.'}
{3: 'You and Alpha jump back at the same time.'}
{3: 'Xun crashes into the spot you just left. His limbs stab deep into the ground, and the ground cracks and caves in around him.'}
{3: 'Alpha charges forward with her blade aimed at his face.'}
{3: 'You open fire too, sending energy shots into his outstretched limbs.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Xun stumbles back a few steps, eyes burning with rage.'}
{3: 'As he shouts, more mechanoids swarm in from every direction.'}
{3: 'Alpha keeps stepping forward. Each swing cuts like a scythe, sending broken parts flying with every turn.'}
{3: 'The fight drags on for ten minutes. By the end, mechanoid wreckage is piled up like a small hill.'}
{3: 'Alpha "struggles" to block one of Xun\'s wide swings and steps back twice.'}
{3: 'You breathe hard, pull a short blade off a nearby mechanoid, and let a little "panic" slip into your voice.'}
{3: 'Alpha\'s voice carries just enough "frustration" to sound convincing.'}
{3: 'Alpha swings her blade to drive back the mechanoids beside her, and the two of you reach the motorcycle.'}
{3: 'The engine roars and the motorcycle takes off, carrying you toward the outskirts.'}
{3: 'Xun waves his limbs excitedly, directing the mechanoids like a conductor.'}
{3: 'A flood of mechanoids surges after you, pouring down the route you took.'}
{3: 'East side of the city. Curo Square.'}
{3: 'Roland stands up high, looking down at the motorcycle heading into the square, and the dense swarm of mechanoids chasing behind it.'}
{3: 'The motorcycle rolls into the square and stops. A wave of mechanoids floods in after it.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Overhead, hundreds of armed drones gather like a swarm of locusts.'}
{3: 'Xun jumps high over his front line and slams down in the center of the square. His red eyes lock onto you and Alpha.'}
{3: 'Your shot cuts him off mid-sentence, and it only makes him angrier.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha lowers her stance, raises her dagger, and charges toward Xun.'}
{3: 'The ground gives a deep rumble, centered on Curo Square. Then an invisible pulse wave spreads out fast, and every electronic system it touches shuts down instantly.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Every mechanoid, whether charging, aiming, or firing, freezes at the exact same time.'}
{3: 'Like puppets with their strings cut, they collapse in piles. The drones drop from the sky all at once.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'With a bright flash of her crimson long blade, Alpha strikes several times in an instant and cuts off all of Xun\'s limbs.'}
{3: 'Alpha steadies her breathing and sheaths her blade at her waist.'}
{3: 'In a dark factory on the west side of the city, assembly lines run in a steady rhythm, constantly turning out new killing machines.'}
{3: 'Lamia carefully sneaks out of the factory.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lamia', 3: 'All the bombs are planted. Next is detonation.', 4: '1', 18: '100017293'}
{3: 'Once she\'s far enough away, Lamia looks back at the quiet factory.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Xun lies on the ground, glaring as the three of you walk toward him.'}
{3: 'Roland loads a special explosive round, then hands his gun to Alpha.'}
{3: 'Alpha catches it, aims at Xun without hesitation, and pulls the trigger.'}
{3: 'At the same moment, a huge explosion booms from the armory factory on the other side of the city.'}
{3: 'In the smoke, a burst of fireworks goes off too, clearly planted on purpose.'}
{3: 'The fireworks form a rough outline of a chibi Lamia\'s smiley face in the sky.'}
{3: 'The motorcycle carries you and Alpha out of the city, heading toward the massive structure in the distance.'}
{2: 'Does it look bigger than it did back on the mountain?', 3: '662'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Looks like we\'re getting closer to Shadow.', 4: '18', 18: '100017299'}
{1: '1', 3: 'A car drives alongside the motorcycle. Roland is behind the wheel, saying he\'ll see you off for the last stretch.'}
{2: 'Roland. What will you and Lamia do after this?', 3: '669'}
{2: 'Roland', 3: 'Lamia will get back to her idol career.', 4: '1', 18: '100017300'}
{2: 'Roland', 3: 'Me... I\'ll probably reopen my agency downtown.', 4: '1', 18: '100017301'}
{2: 'Roland', 3: 'Maybe I\'ll look for Boss Luna too. Either way, I\'m just looking for a calm life.', 4: '1', 18: '100017302'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Up ahead, the rift comes into clear view. Around it, more than a dozen mechanoids are waiting.'}
{3: 'As you get close, all three of you get out of your vehicles.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Roland', 3: 'Well, look at that. The final extras have arrived.', 4: '1', 18: '100017304'}
{2: 'Roland', 3: 'Your tactics worked even better than I expected.', 4: '1', 18: '100017305'}
{2: 'Roland', 3: 'Leave it to me. This is the last thing I can do for you.', 4: '1', 18: '100017306'}
{3: 'His usual smile fades, and his tone turns serious.'}
{2: 'Roland', 3: 'What I\'m about to say might sound strange coming from me.', 4: '1', 18: '100017308'}
{2: 'Roland', 3: 'But after this... try to be a little more honest with yourself.', 4: '1', 18: '100017309'}
{2: 'Roland', 3: 'Even if it all disappears in the end...', 4: '1', 18: '100017310'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Roland', 3: 'When you\'re on stage, why obsess over what\'s real?', 4: '1', 18: '100017312'}
{3: 'With that, he smiles and charges at the mechanoids.'}
{3: 'You and Alpha get on the motorcycle. Alpha twists the throttle. The bike kicks up dust and shoots straight into the rift.'}
